name: Infinitrack Brutal Dozer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブルータルドーザー
desc: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand, you can: Special Summon 1 "Infinitrack" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer", but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except EARTH Machine monsters. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand, you can: Special Summon 1 "Infinitrack" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer", but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except EARTH Machine monsters. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand, you can: Special Summon 1 "Infinitrack" monster from your Deck in Defense Position, except "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer", but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except EARTH Machine monsters. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Brutal Dozer" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
